    iree::hal::drivers::amdgpu::cts::testdata_amdgpu

    iree::testing::gtest
    iree::testing::gtest_main
  LABELS
    "iree-build-requirement=runtime.hal.amdgpu"
    "iree-run-requirement=runtime.resource.amd_gpu"
    "runtime-resource=amd-gpu"
  RESOURCE_GROUP
    iree-hal-drivers-amdgpu-tests
)
endif()
endif()
if(IREE_HAL_DRIVER_AMDGPU)
iree_amdgpu_hal_cts_testdata(
  NAME
    testdata_amdgpu_pm4_command_buffer_benchmark
  TARGET
    amdgcn-amd-amdhsa
  TARGETS
    ${IREE_HAL_AMDGPU_TARGETS}
  FORMAT_NAME
    amdgpu_pm4_command_buffer_benchmark
  FORMAT_STRING
    [=["amdgcn-amd-amdhsa--{AMDGPU_TARGET}"]=]
  IDENTIFIER
    "iree_pm4_command_buffer_benchmark_testdata_amdgpu"
  BACKEND_NAME
    "amdgpu"
  INTERNAL_HDRS
    "${IREE_BINARY_DIR}/runtime/src/iree/hal/drivers/amdgpu/abi/amdgpu_abi_bitcode_hdrs.stamp"
    "${IREE_BINARY_DIR}/runtime/src/iree/hal/drivers/amdgpu/device/bitcode_hdrs.stamp"
  SRCS
    "pm4_command_buffer_benchmark_testdata.c"
  TESTONLY
)
endif()

if(IREE_HAL_DRIVER_AMDGPU)
iree_cc_binary_benchmark(
  NAME
    pm4_command_buffer_benchmark
  SRCS
    "pm4_command_buffer_benchmark.cc"
  DEPS
    ::amdgpu
    ::headers
    ::testdata_amdgpu_pm4_command_buffer_benchmark
    iree::async
    iree::async::util::proactor_pool
    iree::base
    iree::base::threading
    iree::base::tooling::flags
    iree::hal
    iree::hal::cts::util::registry
    iree::hal::drivers::amdgpu::abi
    iree::hal::drivers::amdgpu::util::benchmark_flags
    iree::hal::drivers::amdgpu::util::benchmark_profile
    iree::third_party::google_benchmark
  TESTONLY
  LABELS
    "benchmark"
    "iree-build-requirement=runtime.hal.amdgpu"
    "iree-run-requirement=runtime.resource.amd_gpu"
    "runtime-resource=amd-gpu"
  RESOURCE_GROUP
    iree-hal-drivers-amdgpu-tests
)
endif()
